title: Wisdom Watch — current work conflict scan

risks.summary: Maker reading Dink-owned live files before cousin auto-dispatch is wired
risks.recommended_correction: Hold live Maker dispatch on Dink files; keep mock receipts honest until Dink wires transport gap.

risks.summary: Relay / Petra transport without thread registry — packets may land shallow
risks.conflicting_task: Automatica relay cards + Focus Thief / Mobile SD fire surface
risks.recommended_correction: Do not trust auto-send; attach thread identity in outbox before cousin paste.

risks.summary: Operator frontier diverges from machine rank — attention cost hidden
risks.conflicting_task: Operator: Workstation Uniformization vs Machine: Doss Stability Investigation
risks.recommended_correction: Explicit override receipt when keeping P0-A001 over machine P0-A002; surface delay cost in dispatch matrix.

risks.summary: SoleDash feature velocity risks compressing causal doctrine into slogans
risks.conflicting_task: Mobile field command + wisdom/focus panels shipping fast
risks.recommended_correction: Handoffs must cite cause → effect → lesson; no one-paragraph 'wire-only' summaries to Petra/Bean.

risks.summary: Critical context still lives in chat if Dink/Maker lanes stall
risks.conflicting_task: Maker must read Dink-owned files only — cousin auto-dispatch and external receipt transport still pending.
risks.recommended_correction: Write watch reports and receipts to foreman/soledash/ — repo memory survives tool death.

risks.summary: Partial-live mock transport can look like success without external proof
risks.conflicting_task: MOCK TEST MODE banner on Command layer
risks.recommended_correction: Keep SIM/MOCK labels on receipts; never hide transport_gap from operator.
